headline: Axon Enterprise (AXON) Stock After Recent Volatility Is The Current Price Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Axon Enterprise is attractively priced or simply expensive momentum, the next sections will walk through what the current share price might imply about future expectations. The stock recently closed at US$510.60, with returns of 24.5% over the past week and 13.8% over the past month. It has declined 9.4% year to date and 38.3% over the past year, while still showing a gain of 162.4% over three years and 187.2% over five years. Recent headlines around Axon...

headline: How investors should react when market heavyweights make moves
summary: Opening Bid Host Brian Sozzi poses his Question of the Day: "What should the average investor do with a stock when a prominent buyer buys or sells?" To answer it, he's joined by Portfolio Wealth Advisors President & CIO Lee Munson and BCA Research Chief Global Strategist and Director of Research Peter Berezin, who break down how investors should interpret high-profile trades and whether they're worth following.

headline: Axon Enterprise (AXON) Stock Drew Ethics Questions After Trump Bought $5 Million In Shares
summary: President Trump reported purchasing US$1 to 5 million in Axon Enterprise (NasdaqGS:AXON) shares shortly before a proposed US$220 million ICE contract for Axon TASER products emerged. The timing of the stock purchase and the apparently tailored ICE procurement process has raised conflict-of-interest and ethics questions. Ethics specialists and commentators are flagging potential risks around government contracting practices and Axon’s exposure to political scrutiny. Axon Enterprise, best...
